data.raceName: BARRIER REEF POOLS CG&E BM60 HANDICAP
data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. THE DEPUTY is knocking on the door after a strong closing second over 1300m here 15 days ago, having also just missed at his two runs prior on this track. He slides down in class, and with the aid of a 2kg claim to offset his weight rise, he can go one better. 3. CHINCHILLA AHEAD resumed here over 1000m as the favourite and he stuck on well for fourth. He steps up to a more suitable trip and with a superior record second-up, he is good enough to take this out, especially with the aid of a 3kg claim. 2. KAREEM found the company too slick at Rockhampton over 1100m last time out, but he is better suited back to this grade. He normally finds the line strongly, and if the tempo is genuine, then he is good enough to have the last say here. 5. BARCELONA EXPRESS returned in good order at Coffs Harbour nearly 5 weeks ago when finishing runner-up over 1010m on a heavy track. This is no harder, and 4 of his 5 career wins have been over this trip. Stick with him.","runners":[1,3,2,5],"exclusive":true}
